title: Project Miner Temp Power Financial Handoff Baseline Live Admission
authority_basis: Jason's 2026-05-18 standing PM blocker authority as repo technical authority and project stakeholder.
objective: Clear the post-customer-completion financial handoff blocker by admitting one insert-only zero-billing, zero-payroll, zero-invoice, zero-accounting Temp Power financial handoff baseline record, without opening billing exports, payroll exports, invoice records, accounting records, customer billing delivery, or external finance-system sync.

PM Lane 278 import reads back as imported with current_candidate_match=true and counts_match=true.
PM Lane 279 field authorization and assignment reads back as 184 assignments for 184 unique imported apparatus rows.
PM Lane 280 schedule/status readiness reads back as 15 ready tasks, 184 ready apparatus, 7 not_started workpackages, 184 assignments, and 0 issues.

PM Lane 282 production tracking reads back as production_tracking_baseline_recorded with record_count=1, production_quantity_count=0, labor_entry_count=0, actual_labor_hours=0.0, apparatus_progress_count=0, and progress_update_count=0.

PM Lane 283 customer completion reads back as customer_completion_baseline_recorded with record_count=1, customer_report_count=0, completion_evidence_count=0, and customer_delivery_authority=not_admitted_external_delivery.
No existing financial handoff baseline seam was present before PM Lane 284.
scope: Add financial handoff record store adapters for memory and Supabase-backed stores.

Add focused tests for accepted zero-finance-output baseline write, idempotent replay, replay mismatch rejection, missing customer completion rejection, finance output widening rejection, and role rejection.
Extend deployed mutation-seam smoke coverage for financial handoff route/readback registration.
Persist one deterministic PM Lane 284 financial handoff baseline record after hosted deploy.
not_allowed: No labor reconciliation entry with nonzero hours or amount.
No source workbook or PDF writeback.
No new service, DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
No autonomous AI business-state mutation beyond the single zero-finance-output financial handoff baseline explicitly admitted here.
schema_plan: Apply migration 007 to runtime DSN without printing secrets.
Verify initial runtime financial handoff record count is 0.
validation_plan: Hosted readback before live write: financial handoff status reports no_financial_handoff_record and storage_available=true.
Hosted live POST: accepted zero-finance-output financial handoff baseline.
Hosted same-payload replay: idempotent_hit with no second record.

Hosted readback after replay: financial_handoff_baseline_recorded, billing/payroll/invoice/accounting counts 0, customer billing delivery count 0, external finance sync count 0, and output authorities not_admitted.
Hosted smokes: deployed mutation-seam smoke with PM intake, hosted PM intake smoke, hosted operations routes smoke.
schema_result: PASS: hosted schema ensure completed through the existing mutation-seam app path; financial handoff pre-write readback returned storage_available=true and record_count=0.
local_validation_result: PASS: financial handoff tests passed, customer completion tests passed, production tracking tests passed, durable field record tests passed, import persistence tests passed, approval persistence tests passed, py_compile passed, packet JSON parsed, and scoped git diff check passed.

Hosted smokes passed: mutation-seam RESULT PASS, PM_INTAKE_HOSTED_SUMMARY failed=0, operations routes failed=0 passed=12.
next_recommended_lane: STOPPED_AWAITING_POST_PILOT_CLOSEOUT_SELECTION_AFTER_FINANCIAL_HANDOFF_BASELINE: select the post-pilot closeout path because billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, customer billing delivery, and external finance outputs remain blocked.
